case_title: TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION VS. ELMONT C. LANE

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT LANE, ELMONT C.
